description: A painting of a corner restaurant building in a French village, with 'RESTAURANT' written on its facade. The white building with green trim sits at an intersection, with warm-toned neighboring buildings on either side. A few figures walk along the street. Trees and foliage appear above the rooftops. The style is characteristic of Maurice Utrillo's street scenes of Parisian and suburban locales, with textured surfaces and a bright, airy atmosphere under a blue sky.
